title: Performance Marketing Manager für B2B (m/w/d)
matched_skills: Analytisches Denkvermögen (data-driven analytics, funnel & conversion analysis)
Professioneller Kundenkontakt (HSBC C-level, B2B client interactions)
B2B Kampagnen (product launch campaigns at IoT/GRG)
Performance Marketing (Campaign performance optimisation, ROI analytics)
core_responsibilities: Konzeption und Optimierung von B2B-Kampagnen auf LinkedIn, Google & Facebook
Entwicklung von B2B Social Ads Strategien
Mitwirkung bei Workshops, Prozessoptimierungen und Blogbeiträgen
recommended_emphasis: Highlight B2B campaign analytics and ROI measurement experience (IoT/GRG roles)
Emphasise analytical approach to campaign optimisation rather than platform execution
Note any exposure to paid social or SEM tools, even if indirect
Address the platform skills gap honestly — hands-on LinkedIn/Google Ads experience is required
